mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review_helpful_votes (review_id, user_id, is_helpful, created_at) VALUES (#{reviewId}, #{userId}, #{isHelpful}, #{createdAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM review_helpful_votes WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_helpful_votes WHERE review_id = #{reviewId}
SELECT review_id as reviewId, user_id as userId, is_helpful as isHelpful, created_at as createdAt FROM review_helpful_votes WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_helpful_votes WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND is_helpful = #{isHelpful}
